PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
SELECT ?year WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P1204 wd:Q503058 .
  ?event wdt:P585 ?date .
  ?event p:P1344 ?participation .
  ?participation ps:P1344 wd:Q9673 .
  ?participation pq:P1108 ?q3time .
  ?participation pq:P3372 "Q3" .
  BIND(STRBEFORE(?q3time , ":") AS ?minutes_str)
  BIND(STRAFTER(?q3time , ":") AS ?seconds_str)
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?q3time , ":"))
  FILTER(REGEX(?minutes_str , "^[0-9]+$"))
  FILTER(REGEX(?seconds_str , "^[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+$"))
  BIND(xsd:integer(?minutes_str) AS ?minutes)
  BIND(xsd:decimal(?seconds_str) AS ?seconds)
  BIND((?minutes * 60) + ?seconds AS ?total_seconds)
  BIND(YEAR(?date) AS ?year)
}
ORDER BY ?total_seconds
OFFSET 1
LIMIT 1
